free_text: A dE-E telescope each with an angular
acceptance of 0.6 degr. was used. Three telescopes were
mounted on each of the two arms placed at either side
of the beam axis. Each detector telescope consisted of
a 150 mu-g thick dE surface barrier detector and two
Si(Li) E-detectors of total thickness 8 mm.
The beam and the target thickness were
continuously monitored by two solid-state detectors
placed symmetrically at +-22 degr.(lab) and at 10 degr.
in the azimuth angle above the reaction plane.
A self-supporting target isotopically enriched to
98.5% Ni-60 was used. Target thicknesses was
